concerns.text: FR-004 specifies 'Benjamini-Hochberg correction for multiple comparisons' but US-2 Acceptance Scenario 3 states 'applies multiple-comparison correction to control family-wise error.' Benjamini-Hochberg controls False Discovery Rate (FDR), not family-wise error rate (FWER). These are statistically incompatible claims within the same requirement set.

Assumptions section states 'at least 50 valid entries' twice. While this is an assumption (not a requirement), it contains an empirical value that should be marked as [deferred] per the spec guidance on planning documents deferring empirical values to implementation phase.
